title: vibetime — Product Requirements
summary: Product requirements for vibetime, a local-first multi-agent coding-time tracker shipped as an Electron desktop app plus a Bun-compiled CLI hook binary for macOS arm64.
scope: CLI surface (install, today, project, export, version)
notes: Manifest declared PRD; treated as authoritative. Document is hybrid in nature: contains a PRD core (§1-4 product/users/use-cases/scope, §14 acceptance criteria, §15 open decisions) plus heavy ADR-like locked decisions (§5), SPEC-like data model (§6), hook runtime constraints (§7), agent hook mappings (§8), and CLI surface (§11). Synthesizer should treat §5 locked technical decisions as locked decision candidates (highest precedence), §6/§7/§8/§12 as technical constraints, §14 as acceptance-criteria requirements, and §15/§16 as open questions / delegated decisions.
